import random


def sort_in_place(items):
    items.sort()
    return items


def process(data):
    items = list(data)
    sorted_list = sort_in_place(items)
    sorted_list.reverse()
    return sorted_list


def main():
    random.seed(0)
    data = [random.randint(1, 100) for _ in range(10)]
